AI Workflow (Left Panel)
1
Organisation Description
Paste or type your org context in the text field on the left.
2
Strategic Intent

3
Business Model Canvas
—Generate BMC— — creates a full canvas linked to your strategy.
4
Capability Map & Architecture
—Generate Architecture— — builds capability map, layers, and heatmap.

                No Strategic Intent defined yet
                Portfolio KPIs (Strategic Alignment • AI Readiness • Technical Debt) unlock after Capability Mapping (Step 3).
                Strategic Alignment
                –
                Capability vs. Strategy Fit
                % of high-importance capabilities that have reached maturity level 3 or above. Low scores signal critical gaps that undermine strategic execution.
                AI Readiness Index
                –
                Capability • System • AI Agent Readiness
                Composite of avg capability maturity (50%), proportion of high-maturity systems (30%), and active AI agents mapped (20%). Indicates readiness to adopt and scale AI.
                Technical Debt Risk
                –
                Legacy Exposure in Critical Capabilities
                Weighted share of capabilities with low maturity (=2), double-counted when strategically critical. High scores signal modernisation urgency before strategic goals can be met.
                AI-Generated CXO Narrative
                Industry & Business Area Benchmark
                Compares your capability portfolio against industry baselines, broken down per active business area. Available after Step 3: Capability Mapping.
                Industry: GENERIC
                Industry benchmarks unlock after Capability Mapping (Step 3)
                Set your industry profile and business areas in the left panel – deltas will appear once capabilities are mapped.
                Area Maturity vs Industry Baseline

                Maturity and strategic importance heatmap

                5-level muted heat scale based on maturity, criticality, and active business area.

                Heatmap Cells

                Capability tiles colored by heat level. Click to inspect.

                Priority summary

                Muted status badges and concise capability guidance.

                Enterprise Dependency Graph
                Three-layer view: Capabilities ? Systems ? AI Agents
                Capability – Layer 1 IT System – Layer 2 AI Agent – Layer 3 System supports Capability Capability depends on Capability
                How to read this graph
                Top row (green): Business Capabilities – what the enterprise does to deliver value.
                Middle row (grey): IT Systems � technology platforms that enable each capability.
                Bottom row (blue icons): AI Agents � automation augmenting specific capabilities.
                Solid arrows point from a capability down to its supporting system or agent. Dashed arrows between capabilities show which capabilities depend on others.
                Tip: click any node to highlight its direct connections. Use the Value Stream dropdown above to focus on a single end-to-end workflow.
                Dependency Impact Simulation
                How to use & interpret
                1) Select a capability/system and click Simulate.
                2) Revenue at Risk: estimated daily revenue/operational value at risk during disruption.
                3) Regulatory Exposure: compliance and penalty risk if process controls fail (LOW, ELEVATED, CRITICAL).
                4) Customer Retention Impact: expected churn/experience impact if service quality drops (MODERATE, SEVERE).
                Use Level 1/Level 2 impact to prioritize resilience investments and mitigation initiatives.
                Select a node and click Simulate to see the downstream blast radius
                Revenue at Risk
                �
                Daily operational loss
                Regulatory Exposure
                �
                Compliance penalty risk
                Customer Retention Impact
                �
                Experience degradation
                CFO View � Financial Guardrails
                Business value is AI-estimated based on FTE & Volume drivers.
                Annual Savings (sum)
                �
                OPEX & efficiency potential
                Total projected annual cost reduction from automating and optimizing capabilities. Based on FTE time savings × labor cost.
                Risk Exposure (sum)
                �
                Revenue/regulatory downside
                Aggregate financial exposure from capability failures, combining revenue impact, regulatory penalties, and operational criticality.
                ROI Potential (avg)
                �
                Savings � invest estimate
                Average return multiple on investment. A value of 2.5× means every SEK invested returns 2.5 SEK annually in savings.
                Payback (avg)
                �
                Months to break-even
                Average time required to recover initial investment through realized savings. Lower values indicate faster value realization.
                CO2 Reduction (avg)
                �
                Sustainability impact %
                Average percentage reduction in carbon footprint or energy consumption across capabilities. Supports ESG and climate commitments.
                Top Savings Opportunities
                Top Risk Exposure Items
                Financial Assumptions (editable)
                Estimates use AI-generated % FTE hours saved and % invoice volume impact.

                Toolkit Landing Page
                🔗 Cross-Toolkit Integration
                4-Phase End-to-End Data Flow – BMC → Value Chain → Capability → Strategy → EA Platform
                Guided Workflow
                BMC �
                No data
                Value Chain �
                No data
                Capability Map �
                No data
                Strategy �
                No data
                Step 1
                AI Business Model Canvas
                Business Model � Value Proposition � Revenue Logic

                Visualize the full business model in one framework. Define customer segments, value proposition, revenue streams, and cost structure. This is the starting point for all strategic analysis � export results directly to Excel (CSV).

                Instructions
                • 1Complete all nine BMC blocks including goals, business drivers, and ESG
                • 2Click "AI Analyze" for a strategic review
                • 3Export to Excel (CSV) using the Save button
                • 4Bring insights into the Value Chain Analyzer
                Use Case
                Enterprise Team � New Digital Business Model
                A business team wants to understand how a new digital service model affects revenue and costs. The BMC reveals weak customer relationships and channels � AI recommends a customer portal and proactive communication as top priorities.
                Customer retention Lower vacancy Clear business logic
                GPT-4o driven analysis
                Open tool
                Step 2
                AI Value Chain Analyzer
                Porter's Value Chain � Strategic Value Analysis

                Analyze the full value chain - from inbound logistics to service and aftersales. Identify where value is created, where it is lost, and where AI and automation can make the biggest impact on margins.

                Instructions
                • 1Start from the BMC - focus on activities and resources
                • 2Fill support activities: infrastructure, HR, technology, procurement
                • 3Fill primary activities across the value chain
                • 4Click "AI Analyze" for strategic analysis
                Use Case
                Operations Leadership - Operations Optimization
                The team wants to understand where reactive maintenance costs the most. Value Chain Analyzer identifies Operations and Service as the weakest links - AI suggests predictive maintenance via IoT as the highest-priority action.
                Cost savings 15-25% Risk reduction Faster decisions
                GPT-4o driven analysis
                Open tool
                Step 3
                AI Capability Mapping
                Organizational Capabilities � Gap Analysis � Prioritization

                Map the operational, digital, and analytical capabilities required to realize your strategy. Identify gaps, prioritize investments, and connect capabilities to concrete business goals and value-chain insights.

                Instructions
                • 1Use insights from the Value Chain Analyzer
                • 2Define capability domains (Data, IoT, FM, Customer Service)
                • 3Assess current state vs. target state per capability (1-5)
                • 4Let AI identify critical gaps and priority order
                Use Case
                domain-specific Company - Digital Service Delivery
                A property manager wants to digitize service flows. Capability Mapping shows that "Incident Management" and "Predictive Maintenance" are critical gaps. AI recommends automated work orders and IoT integration as the first priority.
                Efficiency +30% Clear roadmap Right investments
                GPT-4o driven analysis
                Open tool
                Step 4
                AI Strategy Workbench
                Wardley Mapping � Evolution Strategy � Sourcing

                Place capabilities and components in an evolution map - from Genesis to Commodity. Decide what should be built in-house, bought as a service, or decommissioned. Supports sourcing, innovation strategy, and technology choices.

                Instructions
                • 1Import capabilities from Capability Mapping
                • 2Place each component on the evolution axis
                • 3Define dependencies between components
                • 4Let AI provide sourcing and investment recommendations
                Use Case
                CIO - AI Investment in Energy Optimization
                A company is evaluating AI for energy optimization. Wardley Map shows: sensors = commodity (buy), data pipeline = product (SaaS), predictive AI model = custom build (competitive advantage). A clear investment strategy in 10 minutes.
                ROI optimization Right sourcing Faster time-to-market
                GPT-4o driven analysis
                Open tool
                Step 5
                NextGen EA Maturity Toolbox
                Maturity Assessment � Multi-Industry � Strategic Roadmap

                Evaluate the organization's digital maturity with weighted questions per industry - domain-specific, Retail, Banking, and more. Get a strategic maturity score, radar analysis, and an AI-generated roadmap with prioritized actions tied to concrete business outcomes.

                Instructions
                • 1Select industry or analysis focus (domain-specific, Retail, Banking...)
                • 2Answer weighted self-assessment questions (scale 1-5)
                • 3Review maturity score, radar profile, and maturity level
                • 4Click "Generate AI Analysis" for the strategic roadmap
                Use Case
                CDO / CIO - Digital Maturity Analysis Before Strategy Planning
                A CDO wants to understand where the organization currently stands digitally before investment decisions are made. Maturity Toolbox provides a weighted score per category, identifies critical gaps, and delivers an AI-generated 12-month roadmap with clear priorities.
                Clear current-state view Right investment focus Risk reduction
                GPT-5 � PDF report � Multi-industry
                Open tool
                Step 6
                Application Portfolio Management
                Inventory � Lifecycle � Ownership � Rationalization

                Map the full application landscape � from system registry and lifecycle status to ownership and cost analysis. Identify redundancy, understand technical fit vs business value, and prioritize rationalization actions in a structured portfolio view.

                Instructions
                • 1Add applications with fact sheets (owner, cost, lifecycle)
                • 2Score Technical Fit and Business Value (1�5) per application
                • 3Visualize the portfolio in the lifecycle kanban and fit matrix
                • 4Set rationalization action: Retain / Invest / Replace / Consolidate / Retire
                Use Case
                CIO � Application Rationalization
                A CIO wants to reduce application costs by 20%. The APM tool identifies 8 of 34 applications as legacy with low business value and high operating cost. The fit matrix clearly shows candidates for retire and consolidate � solid input for the IT budget discussion.
                Cost reduction Redundancy elimination Clear portfolio view
                LocalStorage � JSON export � 5 views
                Open tool
                Step 7
                Legacy Mainframe Modernization
                Banking & Insurance · M4 Maturity · TIME Framework · APQC

                Design and execute transformation programs for legacy mainframe systems. Assess organizational readiness using the M4 Maturity Model, classify workloads with APQC industry templates, apply Gartner's TIME framework, and plan migration waves with tollgate governance and CAPEX modeling.

                Instructions
                • 1Complete M4 Maturity assessment (30 capability dimensions across Discovery, Architecture, Data, Organization, Operations)
                • 2Import and classify workloads using 27 APQC Banking/Insurance templates with AI classification support
                • 3Apply TIME framework (Tolerate/Invest/Migrate/Eliminate) and organize into migration waves
                • 4Define tollgate governance, build CAPEX model, and manage 7-category risk register
                Use Case
                Transformation Lead — Core Banking Modernization
                A transformation lead at a regional bank needs to modernize a 30-year-old mainframe handling 200+ batch jobs and 15 core banking workloads. Using the toolkit, they achieve M4 Level 3 maturity readiness, classify all workloads using APQC templates, identify 60% for migration and 25% for investment, plan 5 migration waves with tollgate milestones, estimate €12M CAPEX, and maintain a risk register scoring business continuity risks at 4.2/5.
                15-27 APQC workloads M4 Maturity 30 points TIME Framework Tollgate Governance
                AI-powered workload classification — Radar charts — JSON export
                Open tool
                Step 8
                EA Engagement Playbook
                Stakeholder Engagement · Communication Planning · Change Management

                Build a comprehensive engagement strategy for your EA initiative. Map stakeholders, define communication plans, track engagement activities, and measure adoption. Essential for ensuring business buy-in and successful EA transformation.

                Instructions
                • 1Identify and map all stakeholders (executives, business units, IT teams)
                • 2Define engagement approach per stakeholder group (influence, interest matrix)
                • 3Create communication plan with touchpoints, channels, and messaging
                • 4Track engagement activities and measure adoption metrics
                Use Case
                EA Lead – Enterprise Architecture Transformation Program
                An EA lead needs to launch a digital transformation initiative across 5 business units with 200+ stakeholders. Using the Engagement Playbook, they map 12 key stakeholder groups, create tailored communication plans for C-suite vs. operational teams, schedule 15 engagement touchpoints over 6 months, and achieve 85% stakeholder satisfaction score with clear adoption metrics.
                Executive buy-in Clear communication Change adoption Risk mitigation
                Stakeholder mapping · Communication templates · Activity tracking
                Open tool
                STANDALONE
                WhiteSpot Service Delivery Heatmap
                Prospect Analysis · Service Coverage · APQC Integration · Opportunity Mapping

                Analyze service delivery opportunities across 41 services for prospects and customers. Visualize coverage gaps, assess service states (FULL/PARTIAL/LOST/POTENTIAL), map to APQC process framework, and identify upsell opportunities. Works standalone or integrates with EA Engagement Playbook.

                Instructions
                • 1Add prospect/customer with basic information (industry, region, revenue)
                • 2Create heatmap and assess 41 HL services across 3 L1 areas (Business/Technology/Managed)
                • 3Track L3 component delivery and calculate coverage scores per service
                • 4Map services to APQC processes with semantic matching (60% keyword + 20% description + 20% alignment)
                • 5Identify opportunities, estimate values, and export heatmap for proposals or team collaboration
                Use Case
                Sales Team – Quick Prospect Opportunity Assessment
                A sales team identifies new prospect "Global Bank International" ($2.5B revenue). Before client meeting, they use WhiteSpot Standalone to assess service coverage: 5 services marked FULL (existing delivery), 8 PARTIAL (expansion opportunities), 3 LOST (win-back from competitors), 25 POTENTIAL (whitespace). APQC mapping reveals gaps in Cloud Strategy and Data Analytics processes. Result: $1.75M opportunity pipeline identified in 30 minutes, exported as JSON, and shared with solution architects for proposal development.
                41 Service Offerings APQC Process Mapping Opportunity Pipeline Export/Import JSON
                AI-powered APQC matching · localStorage persistence · Standalone mode
                Open tool
